run_summary.summary: One update since the last scan: Liz submitted the revised SOJOS video with voice-over at 1:37 PM today — the revision Ruby requested yesterday. It's now back in Brand's court for approval. All other emails in today's window (Flexsteel Popfly deadline, Yousky $250 reply, Dreo/Govee/Bedsure follow-ups) were already captured by earlier runs today.

suggestions.message: Revised video with voice-over submitted to Ruby — ball is in SOJOS's court now. If no reply by Monday (Apr 27), nudge Ruby for approval so you can move to scheduling.

deals.next_action: Wait for Ruby at SOJOS to approve revised video with voice-over
deals.notes: [Apr 23]: Liz submitted revised video with voice-over per Ruby's request — shared via Google Drive (drive.google.com/drive/folders/1n6MJkM0aFQ8bHU_5NySfcxFiZ7gxy4h6). Waiting on Ruby's approval.
deals.activity_note: Apr 23: Revision resubmitted — added voice-over per Ruby's request, now waiting on SOJOS approval
